tickets.title: Certify and publish the exact v0.6.0 candidate
tickets.objective: Freeze one exact v0.6.0 commit, prove its source, migration, assets, reviews, and remote install, then publish and clean up branches.
scope: GitHub pull request, tag, release assets, remote smoke, and branch cleanup
nonGoals: Automatic deletion of consumer-owned or quarantined legacy files
acceptanceCriteria: All version and release surfaces agree on 0.6.0
The exact candidate passes the required source and smoke matrix
Authentic public v0.5 adoption is preserved and fail-closed
Two independent reviews approve and Internal Audit passes
The exact commit and complete asset set are published and remotely verified
The superseded v0.6 branch is deleted and the checkout ends clean on main
requiredVerification: Complete Python 3.13 and Python 3.9 smoke suites
Shell syntax and git diff checks
Authentic public v0.5 adoption and activation boundary
Release bundle validation and asset checksums
Two independent code reviews and disposable Internal Audit
expectedEvidence: Exact commit SHA and clean tree
GitHub pull request, tag, release, and remote smoke proof
risks: A stable v0.5 consumer cannot adopt v0.6
The published tag or assets do not match the reviewed commit
Verification is duplicated or run against a stale candidate
Branch cleanup occurs before release proof
